title: Outside Main Wall Smoke (Front)
notes: First half of the standard outside tactical screen. Blocks off close Garage and deep CT Red yard sightlines to allow safe outside scaling.

title: Outside Main Wall Smoke (Back/Secret Link)
notes: Second half of the outside tactical screen. Overlaps perfectly with the front smoke to create a blind corridor for crossing completely down into Secret.

title: Ramp / Trophy Room Entry Molotov
notes: Flushes out aggressive CT anchors holding close setup angles or shotguns directly at the bottom of the Ramp boundary line.

title: Squeaky Door Anti-Rush Smoke
notes: Essential round-start containment utility. Blocks off the Squeaky door threshold instantly to deny fast Terrorist inner A-site executes or vent dives.

title: Outside Cross Counter-Molotov
notes: Excellent defensive tool. Thrown over the Mini roof structure into the T-yard crossing lane to break or delay the Terrorist outside wall execution timing.

title: Top Hut / Mustang Molotov (From T-Roof)
notes: Mandatory A-site execute piece. Spreads across the entirety of Top Hut to completely flush out the close crossfire anchor. Crucial: Make sure a teammate shoots out the lobby ceiling glass panels before throwing!
